name: worker-default
desc: Handoff / metadata pipeline only. implement_code is briefing_only (does not write code). git_commit_changes records review metadata (does not git commit). Real implementation is done by an external Worker Agent after skill-primary start.

children.name: implement
children.desc: briefing_only: returns prompt/context; external Worker Agent writes code

children.name: git_commit
children.desc: record_review_metadata: requires clean worktree; does not run git commit
